name: Tina Smith
subject: The GOP's tax bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Two years ago today, Republicans rammed through a partisan tax bill that put the wealthy and corporations above everyday Americans.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191222-tax?refcode=em191222-tax&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

I got into politics to fight for the issues that matter to everyday families, like access to quality, affordable health care, raising the minimum wage, and leveling the playing field.

But it's clear Republicans in Congress have a very different set of values.

**Two years ago today, Republicans like my opponent, Jason Lewis, rammed through a partisan tax bill (which passed in the dead of night in the Senate!) that put the wealthy and corporations above everyday Americans.**

Families thought they would see a boost in their paychecks or higher refunds during tax season -- instead, **83% of the benefits will go to the top 1%** by 2027 while many middle-class families watch their taxes go up.

Small businesses thought they would have room to get off the ground -- instead, big **Fortune 500 corporations paid no federal income taxes** and got _billions_ in tax cuts to enrich their wealthy investors and CEOs, leaving workers in the dust.

People everywhere hoped the GOP tax bill would make their lives easier -- instead, they played hardworking Americans for fools.

I'm determined to win re-election next year and keep Minnesota away from the GOP's grasp. But if I'm honest, we have a very tough fight ahead of us. Right-wing special interests will do whatever it takes to keep their influence in Washington (and those tax breaks in their pockets), so I'm asking for your help today:

**If you're sick and tired of the GOP turning their backs on the American people to please their wealthy donors, then donate $10 or more to help us save Minnesota's Senate seat by hitting our critical FEC goal. Every dollar will go toward keeping our state from flipping red next year.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191222-tax?refcode=em191222-tax&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191222-tax?refcode=em191222-tax&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191222-tax?refcode=em191222-tax&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191222-tax?refcode=em191222-tax&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

I've had enough of Republicans laughing and congratulating themselves on profiting off the backs of everyday Americans. With your help, we can win re-election here in Minnesota, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put power back in the hands of the people.

Thanks for reading.

-- Tina

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). name: Stephanie Noguera, Team Kennedy
subject: What we built in 2019 [pics!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e91/55b66746/2d23fcfb/80f65d8/2240015998/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | 90 days. I can't believe what we've built in just 90 days. A bustling headquarters. A team of 20+ and growing. Hundreds of volunteers. Thousands of phone calls. Thousands of miles logged north and south, east and west, all across this amazing Commonwealth. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e91/55b66746/2d23fcfb/80f65d9/2240015998/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-22-road-recap&recurring=1&amount=3") **This is our movement. And you know as well as I do: We're just getting started.** [**Help us keep up the momentum: Contribute $3 now to fuel our fight in 2020!**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e91/55b66746/2d23fcfb/80f65d9/2240015998/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-22-road-recap&recurring=1&amount=3") From the very start, Joe's made it clear that he'll be a Senator who shows up for Massachusetts. So that's exactly what we're doing. From Chelsea to Greenfield, Gloucester to Quincy, Worcester and Fitchburg and Roxbury and Beverly and Fall River and Pittsfield and countless communities in between. **Over 70 cities and towns in 90 days. And the energy out there is**** _incredible_****:** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e91/55b66746/2d23fcfb/80f65d9/2240015998/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-22-road-recap&recurring=1&amount=3") Joe is committed to reaching folks who feel like the system has left them behind. He'll fight with everything he's got to show them they count, they're heard, they're seen. **We'll be fighting alongside him every step of the way. This is just the beginning.** There are offices to open, organizers to hire, yard signs to print, bumper stickers to pass out, doors to knock, conversations to have--and tens of thousands of more miles to log in our trusty campaign car. [**Let's finish the year strong: Contribute $3 now before our major end-of-year fundraising deadline to help grow our movement and keep Joe on the road so he can make his case to as many folks as possible.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e91/55b66746/2d23fcfb/80f65d9/2240015998/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Last Week with Rob #3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
# **LAST WEEK WITH ROB**

Dear Friends,

It’s been another busy week in New York’s 27th Congressional District. In Washington D.C., House Democrats carried out the shameful act of impeachment following sham hearings and partisan tactics. Back here in New York, I announced two important new endorsements for my campaign for Congress!
---
|
---
### Partisan Impeachment
This week, House Majority Democrats crossed a line that would have ashamed our founding fathers. They used one of the greatest powers granted to them by the U.S. Constitution to impeach a president for political gain. The charges were weak and the motivations were clear. The fact is, Democrats can’t beat President Trump and they can’t control the tens of millions of Americans who stand with him. I’m running for Congress to protect our communities and to fight the radically-regressive Democrats who look to undermine our democratically-elected president and overturn the will of the American people.
|
---
### Niagara Conservative Party Endorsement
This week, I was honored to receive two new endorsements for my campaign. On Wednesday, the members of the Niagara County Conservative Party selected me as their preferred choice for New York's 27th Congressional District seat. NY-27 needs a conservative, battle-tested patriot representing its constituents and defending our President. I’m honored that the members of the Niagara County Conservative Party have entrusted me with their support. Conservatism starts at the local level and it’s been my pleasure working with local conservatives to protect the rights of taxpayers, gun owners, and the unborn while defending our borders, our veterans, and our President.
|
---
### Associated Builders and Contractors Endorsement
I also received an endorsement from the Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC), Empire Chapter. I’m honored to have the endorsement of the more than 20,000 hardworking men and women represented by the ABC. I’m proud to have had the support of this organization in the past and I have always believed that America is a nation of builders. During my time in the New York State Senate, I worked diligently to support pro-business, worker-friendly policies that make construction projects safer and less costly, and I will continue to do so when serving the hardworking men and women of New York’s 27th Congressional District in Washington. The American economy is working when these men and women are working.
| Thank you again for reading another “Last Week With Rob.” I hope you have a joyous Christmas with your family and friends. Remember to share with me your thoughts on the state of our country. And remember: Die Hard IS a Christmas movie.

As always, feel free to stay up to date on my campaign by following me on facebook and twitter at @RobOrttforCongress and let me know what’s going on in your community and your life. Thank you and God Bless.

Rob
Battle-tested Patriot

body:
Wow, thank you! I just checked our finances before heading out for Christmas and I saw a major improvement in our fundraising since the team emailed you last week. I've attached it below so you can check out the impact you helped make! [**If you missed our last email, you can chip in now to give our campaign a pre-Christmas boost!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/byrRB-YboaL90h5sA5SGpE6K2T60qVx8oKl9-uOjmyw=/Urp6EiDZWPr95nSxDPgv9JO7apTPtN9vK-lYoiRUbkQ=?amount=22&recurring=auto&refcode=20191223email) | | **[DONATE $22 NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/byrRB-YboaL90h5sA5SGpE6K2T60qVx8oKl9-uOjmyw=/Urp6EiDZWPr95nSxDPgv9JO7apTPtN9vK-lYoiRUbkQ=?amount=22&recurring=auto&refcode=20191223email)**
---

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/byrRB-YboaL90h5sA5SGpE6K2T60qVx8oKl9-uOjmyw=/Urp6EiDZWPr95nSxDPgv9JO7apTPtN9vK-lYoiRUbkQ=?amount=22&recurring=auto&refcode=20191223email)
**But with the holidays and New Year 's Eve basically at our doorstep, we can't breathe a sigh of relief just yet -- we're still $38,829 away from our overall end-of-year goal!** And many of our supporters will (understandably) be offline in the next few days as they enjoy time with family...which could mean a _complete standstill_ in fundraising.
**With all the new candidates and national interest in the race for TX-22, it 's critical that we continue to show strong fundraising numbers.** If we don't hit our goal for this quarter, it could be catastrophic to our campaign's momentum.
[**So before you go offline to enjoy the holidays, please chip in to help us reach this critical fundraising goal ⇒**](https://act.myngp.com/el/byrRB-YboaL90h5sA5SGpE6K2T60qVx8oKl9-uOjmyw=/Urp6EiDZWPr95nSxDPgv9JO7apTPtN9vK-lYoiRUbkQ=?amount=22&recurring=auto&refcode=20191223email)

Last election, we were considered the underdog and were outraised by our Republican opponent. Even still, we turned this district that most Democrats had written off into a national battleground, closing a 19% gap to just 4%. Our campaign understood that we could turn the tides by knocking on doors and getting our message directly to the voters. This election, we are going to continue the job we started — and win! But, we need your support to help us raise the funds to finish the job. = = = = = = Our system is broken. We are running against the third richest member of Congress — worth $300 million dollars. I am running to represent people, not corporate interests. Our campaign relies on small dollar donations from teachers, state workers, retirees, and people who have been left behind by the political system. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: MJ for Texas
subject: Sen. Cornyn's health care record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Why is a dark money group thanking him for opposing a reform that would lower costs by billions of dollars?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890664/7f51f7bc/4a146e9b/4ef0c834/954763788/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890664/7f51f7bc/4a146e9b/4ef0c82b/954763788/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-senatefight?refcode=email_20191223.1nd__671__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter -- Senator Cornyn just got another windfall. A dark money group that's already spent **more than $2 million** on ads in Texas is now spending even more to thank him -- for _opposing_ legislation that would _lower_ health care costs!
And this isn't the first time Sen. Cornyn has turned his back on us, selling out our health care to the powerful special interests.
* Sen. Cornyn voted _18 times_ to repeal the Affordable Care Act.
* He voted _against_ a bill that would have lowered prescription drug costs.
* He voted to allow insurance companies to _charge older Texans more_ for coverage.
* He supported a lawsuit that would strike down the entire ACA, _including protections for people with pre-existing conditions!_

---
[**HELP MJ DEFEAT SEN. CORNYN >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890664/7f51f7bc/4a146e9b/4ef0c82b/954763788/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-senatefight?refcode=email_20191223.1nd__671__&amount=10&recurring=true")
As a combat veteran who took gunfire during her service and a working mom who had two difficult pregnancies, **MJ understands that _everyone_ needs access to quality, affordable care.** She'll fight to make sure every Texan can get the care they need -- but she needs your support to win this race!

**Will you pitch in now to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn so she can fight for Texans ' health care in the Senate?**

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Blessings to you and your family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, I want to take a quick minute and wish you and your family a happy holiday.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=69A84A1A962)
---
| | |
---
| | Seasons greetings!

I wanted to take this opportunity to wish those celebrating Hanukkah and Christmas my best as we gather with loved ones to celebrate faith, family, and friendship.

This past year I was blessed to visit the Holy Land, to see Jerusalem and Bethlehem, both reminders that for all people what unites us is so much stronger than what tries to divide us.

As you gather with loved ones, please keep our troops, especially those away from home and their families this holiday season, in your prayers. Please also pray for the safety of our first responders who work every day to protect and aid our citizens.

From my family to yours, Happy Hanukkah, Merry Christmas, and may your new year be filled with happiness and health.

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Derek, can you take Mark's 2020 Issues survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark is looking forward to getting back to work for Virginians as soon as the Senate reconvenes in January.
|
---
| | | **[Take Mark 's 2020 Issues Survey](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70a/53d9897e/53bc1152/1c89c27e/2335867650/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-2020issues")**
---
Derek --

Over the past year, Mark has worked hard on the issues that matter most to Virginians.

Mark has led the fight to secure our elections. He fought to protect gains we've made on healthcare, to lower prescription drug prices, and to make sure that people with pre-existing conditions continue to have access to quality care. And he continues to work on other important issues from strengthening our economy for American workers to improving care for our veterans.

Mark is looking forward to getting back to work for Virginians as soon as the Senate reconvenes in January. But as he prepares for the new year, Mark wants to know: **[What issues do _you_ want him to focus on in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70a/53d9897e/53bc1152/1c89c27e/2335867650/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-2020issues")**

---
Thank you,

Team Warner

name: Bill Olson
subject: Term limits please!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ

Hi Peter

I think that the root of so many problems we are seeing in Washington right now is career politicians.

These people have just been there too darn long!

Democrat Majority Leader Steny Hoyer has been in office 38 years, as has Chuck Schumer.

Jerry Nadler, 27 years. Nancy Pelosi, 32 years. Maxine Waters, 28 years.

In fact, 55 members of Congress have served at least two decades in DC.

As out-of-touch as this whole impeachment hoax has been, a lot of it is explained by the fact that the entire Democrat leadership is past its prime and completely out of touch with the American people!

These people won't leave the Swamp!

President Trump himself has called for Term Limits, and I agree:

On the campaign trail President Trump vowed to “propose a constitutional amendment to impose term limits on all members of Congress” as part of his “Contract with the American Voter.” Congressional term limits are far from a new idea and are often considered a possible solution to the aging of Congress. However, past proposals have all failed to garner the two-thirds majority in both chambers required for a constitutional amendment.

These people, the career politicians- like my liberal Democrat opponent, Darren Soto- need to be reigned in. They need to be divorced from the power the Swamp gives them!

Of course, I will defeat Darren Soto. But we need to stop any future Darren Sotos from staying in Congress too long!

Unlike him, I will do what I was sent there to do, and leave. It's not my career!

We need to oust extreme Democrats like Darren Soto, who is way to the left of Florida, and send pro-Constitution representatives to Congress!

Most importantly, we need to make the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing to our Constitution and to the country- and stop them from ever doing it again.

I need your help today!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ
I need your help today- to make the Democrats pay, and replace Darren Soto and stop impeachment! Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose in 2020 with Trump at the top of the ticket- so let's send him a Congress that prefers Liberty over "woke"!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gZ0ykb3lml6OuRU&b=fyz7j3QDTnj19tFybT3TYQ
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter I think that the root of so many problems we are seeing in Washington right now is career politicians. These people have just been there too darn long! Democrat Majority Leader Steny Hoyer has been in office 38 years, as has Chuck Schumer. Jerry Nadler, 27 years. Nancy Pelosi, 32 years. Maxine Waters, 28 years. In fact, 55 members of Congress have served at least two decades in DC. As out-of-touch as this whole impeachment hoax has been, a lot of it is explained by the fact that the entire Democrat leadership is past its prime and completely out of touch with the American people! These people won't leave the Swamp! President Trump himself has called for Term Limits, and I agree: On the campaign trail President Trump vowed to “propose a constitutional amendment to impose term limits on all members of Congress” as part of his “Contract with the American Voter.” Congressional term limits are far from a new idea and are often considered a possible solution to the aging of Congress. However, past proposals have all failed to garner the two-thirds majority in both chambers required for a constitutional amendment. These people, the career politicians- like my liberal Democrat opponent, Darren Soto- need to be reigned in. They need to be divorced from the power the Swamp gives them! Of course, I will defeat Darren Soto. But we need to stop any future Darren Sotos from staying in Congress too long! Unlike him, I will do what I was sent there to do, and leave. It's not my career! We need to oust extreme Democrats like Darren Soto, who is way to the left of Florida, and send pro-Constitution representatives to Congress! Most importantly, we need to make the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing to our Constitution and to the country- and stop them from ever doing it again. I need your help today! I need your help today- to make the Democrats pay, and replace Darren Soto and stop impeachment! Can you help me? Can I count on you for a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? The Democrats are going to lose in 2020 with Trump at the top of the ticket- so let's send him a Congress that prefers Liberty over "woke"! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford. No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: Charles Booker
subject: This means a lot to me, folks.
body:
|
---
Folks, As people across our Commonwealth and country come together to celebrate the holidays this week, I wanted to send a message of gratitude for all you’ve done for this movement. Back in November, I announced that I was seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate to replace Mitch McConnell and finally put Kentuckians first. The outpouring of support for this movement since then has shown me that **nothing is impossible as long as regular folks come together.** As I’ve traveled across the Commonwealth talking to folks in smaller areas like Whitesburg and big cities like Lexington, one thing remains the same: **Folks want a senator who puts Kentuckians first.** There’s more that brings us together in this Commonwealth and nation than what tears us apart. We’re not here to point fingers. We’re working to heal and move forward so we can stop fighting each other and start standing together as working people to fight for our fair share. **We’re not going to take the political games any longer.** We’re going to stand up and demand the health care, wages, and clean air and water our communities deserve. **_****_**[I know you’re on board to defeat Mitch McConnell and take our power back. Will you take a moment before the holidays to help my team make up our $7,143 shortage this week? Click here to chip in whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13169124/136378162/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191223-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDBmNDVmMy1iOTI1LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8PoFqSeKbCqCo6YG3vGxYPx4sGcvRpC0eh5lbazx7U=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13169125/136378163/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191223-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDBmNDVmMy1iOTI1LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8PoFqSeKbCqCo6YG3vGxYPx4sGcvRpC0eh5lbazx7U=)******

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Happy Holidays from Little Silver
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
It has been the honor of a lifetime to get to know each of you and work together to bring better representation to New Jersey's 4th District.
|
---

| | Friends-- I just wanted to send you a note of appreciation during this joyful holiday season. It has been the honor of a lifetime to get to know each of you and work together to bring better representation to New Jersey's 4th District. When I meet neighbors from Belmar, Manchester, Hamilton, and everywhere in between, I am moved by your stories. I am humbled to hear about your hopes and dreams for our community, our state, and our country. I carry them with me each and every day of this campaign. As the year comes to an end, I am spending time with my family, reflecting on the first few months of this race, and thinking about how we move forward together in 2020. So, no matter how you celebrate the holidays, I want to say thank you and wish you a joyful end to 2019. With hope,
Stephanie
---
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: Governor Holcomb
subject: Merry Christmas from the Holcomb Family!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
I am so grateful to be spending Christmas with family and friends in Indiana. It is a truly special time of year and I wouldn’t want to spend it any | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

I am so grateful to be spending Christmas with family and friends in Indiana. It is a truly special time of year and I wouldn’t want to spend it any other way.

I hope that you are as blessed as I am and get to do the same this holiday season.

From my family to yours, Merry Christmas!

-Eric

clean_body: Our team is working hard to ensure victory in 2020, but it may not be enough. We are asking you to chip in now, while we still have time. Having a dedicated base of Charter Members will make or break the fight for 2020. Friend, As a devoted supporter of President Trump and his allies, you should know the truth. Right now, our fundraising isn't where it needs to be to reach our end of year goal. Thanks to the Hollywood elite and the liberal establishment, Democrats are consistently outraising us. It's hard to say, but if we want to continue to be competitive in battleground states, we have to step it up. == Our team is working hard to ensure victory in 2020, but it may not be enough. We are asking you to chip in now, while we still have time. Having a dedicated base of Charter Members will make or break the fight for 2020. If we are going to keep President Trump's Senate Majority, we must have enough resources to fight back against the Radical Left! == To be ready for 2020, we need your support. If you wait until Election day, it will be too late. == Thank you for your support, NRSC Membership Team == If you recently updated your membership by mail or phone, you may have received this email by mistake. name: Carly Reilly
subject: Announcing our end-of-year goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
All hands on deck

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL) **$3 MILLION END-OF-YEAR GOAL** [Rush a Contribution Now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=5&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL) Yang Gang --

The biggest challenge of the campaign must be met with the biggest response.

We set a goal of raising $3 million by the end of the year. That’s right -- all of us are going to come together and raise $3 million in just one week.

The truth is, I have no idea if we can pull this off. If we do, it would be -- by far -- our biggest fundraising week of the entire campaign.

[But here’s the other truth, Yang Gang: We don’t have a choice, not with the FEC deadline approaching, debate qualification looming, and only a few weeks to go until the Iowa caucuses. Chip in now to help us reach our goal. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=7&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=13&amount=25&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
As the campaign comes down to the wire and as the field narrows, everything is getting more expensive. And that’s why it’s never been more important that we hit our goal.

We can do this if everyone steps up.
[Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=14&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---
Thanks for being a part of this movement,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20329?t=6&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5036%2E377263%2EWSu6YL) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

I'm the only candidate that traveled to every single county in Iowa. The reason this is important is because it gets to the core value of this campaign: putting voters -- wherever they live -- first.

This campaign is all about sitting down with people just like you to have a real discussion about what policies would provide the most meaningful change in your lives.

It's important to me that this campaign is built by and for the American people.

Because here's the truth: People are sick and tired of partisanship, bickering and politicians looking to serve themselves.

They're fed up with the corruption of this current White House, and are ready to stand up and fight back.

_Together we can fight the partisanship and gridlock in Washington. We can create a better future for America._

**If you 're with me, please consider donating $5 now to help us start 2020 off strong:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.16_e1_jkd_mmd_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=8+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.19_e1_jkd_eoy_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.19_e1_jkd_eoy_all")**

Thanks,
John

name: Team Pence
subject: 2019 in review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Greg spent 2019 advocating for farmers, small businesses, veterans, and rural communities across Indiana. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a6e8922847344f54b23e545e633ae799&_e=vMZIN3q4tbnRYA2r6Kguy04EUMfJQ6Fgi1SW5TTNu2jON0QiUW9q_HFInY3b9xL3d6M5m_SMcK56JKR_yvSxdCUqy-uPIk1266FeKq03tosVP7fE11mHBpcd9Be11Hnjn6PrEDZuobLRVv2IzpiK8Z66sc769T9NXdM3_T8YjhnB5_oLJ9IWGG7HfgmJ1ERpHAYVPFkiTqxjF8RjCX1Di82hZz0_lCr8XiugYTKRUiyvRX5MjOzBosB0CPkUd8b6FxAr3ri58mw6oU4T-ByYRelRyI-cifghFtmW58bxK0Vyhh5lG3r7pwByfSL9g-cyqFDVD5urgLswaIhIRSyONbSzcSV3mZT5l2UWIBsAuoyjV8xMmS2wv1UQ2WejoMtqkFhTVsN8Gb1h3VavfJQ0mHbbr5VLCymkQPkzPm1NnjE%3D) Friend, 2020 is on the horizon and America will be facing an election of immense consequence for our country.
But before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve and we plunge into the chaos of a presidential election year, we invite you to take a minute and reflect on what we fought for in 2019.
Greg spent 2019 advocating for farmers, small businesses, veterans, and rural communities across Indiana, including:
* Pushing to bring the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement to the floor of the House
* Introducing and passing the OORAH Act - allowing Gold Star Families from the 1983 Marine Barracks terrorist attack to access $1.68 billion in frozen Iranian funds as restitution
* Introducing legislation to improve rural broadband access and close the digital divide between rural and urban communities
* Introduced legislation aimed at cutting waste and saving taxpayer dollars in the federal real estate industry
* Fighting the House Democrats’ attempts to rush through a partisan and flawed impeachment inquiry

We can’t wait to keep making progress on issues that are crucially important for our veterans, small businesses, families, and workers in 2020.
What do you think we should fight for in 2020? If you want to make your voice heard on the most important issues of 2020, let us know in the comment box below! An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.
clean_body: Greg spent 2019 advocating for farmers, small businesses, veterans, and rural communities across Indiana. Friend, 2020 is on the horizon and America will be facing an election of immense consequence for our country. But before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve and we plunge into the chaos of a presidential election year, we invite you to take a minute and reflect on what we fought for in 2019. Greg spent 2019 advocating for farmers, small businesses, veterans, and rural communities across Indiana, including: Pushing to bring the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement to the floor of the House Introducing and passing the OORAH Act - allowing Gold Star Families from the 1983 Marine Barracks terrorist attack to access $1.68 billion in frozen Iranian funds as restitution Introducing legislation to improve rural broadband access and close the digital divide between rural and urban communities Introduced legislation aimed at cutting waste and saving taxpayer dollars in the federal real estate industry * Fighting the House Democrats’ attempts to rush through a partisan and flawed impeachment inquiry We can’t wait to keep making progress on issues that are crucially important for our veterans, small businesses, families, and workers in 2020. What do you think we should fight for in 2020? We need to oust McConnell.
|

| | ICYMI _Rolling Stone_ agrees: Winning the Senate "is just as important as retaking the White House," and experts say we have a real shot at taking back the Majority. But we can't rest on the words of pundits. _We need to take action._ [_**Will you chip in a few dollars before the final FEC deadline of the year and put us in a strong position to win this open seat and flip the Senate in 2020?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e9/18d6a294/4cd00ee1/26d6347f/3357409380/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiMTkxMjIzX20ifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191122?refcode=jme191122_191223_m&recurring=true") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e9/18d6a294/4cd00ee1/26d6347c/3357409380/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjIiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiIxOTEyMjNfbSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191122?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme191122_191223_m_&refcode2=107423")

---
Understandably, all eyes are on the presidential race, but our race here in Tennessee will play a huge role in the political landscape for years to come.
**If we don 't flip the Senate, even the best-laid plans will all be for nothing because Mitch McConnell is blocking progress on everything from health care to wages.**
And even worse: McConnell and Republicans have been a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda -- an agenda that has failed to address the opioid epidemic, has led rural hospital closures and has created a trade war that has hurt Tennessee more than any other state.
There's no doubt the stakes are high -- we need to take back the Senate and oust McConnell from leadership.
[_**Together, we can make it happen one grassroots contribution at a time.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e9/18d6a294/4cd00ee1/26d6347f/3357409380/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiMTkxMjIzX20ifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191122?refcode=jme191122_191223_m&recurring=true")
Thank you,
James

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Koch-Funded Smears
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
It is clear that these politicians are prioritizing corporate desires over the needs of the community. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/UqdPhBkyQ3uU21aORGLDHA/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH7189dYeH2YpXK6YwEh9ilHCvC53lF4TgLNDIaSMvpoujRe8PDHa8DZf9RcrG0m1F3lydIdUVTigqRAycSJI-2B0rgHJ1MyU77ePwGSDcyuyr5Iea8DpoL3E8QGvwsJSKKC2DYfP9pC-2BXlsSB4UlXU6665if6SA5nn4-2F1PafvlvdzXmgM-3D/qq2X)
---
Hi Friend, When I decided to run, I knew that I would have to be prepared for attacks. I've been picking a fights with the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street banks, and powerful politicians all my life, and I'm proud to take a stand to defend our future. But the first shots fired in this campaign, are coming from Democrats...Democrats who take money from corporate PAC's and the fossil fuel industry, and are clearly feeling threatened by our surging campaign. Oregon Senator Arnie Roblan and House Rep. Caddy McKeown publicly punched down on me by name, asserting in The Coos Bay World that, "there is no one who can better represent the South Coast and deliver on our unique needs better than our dedicated Congressman." ([1](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/UqdPhBkyQ3uU21aORGLDHA/h1/mm2eSoK-2BXIHa7gkoSGo65ZXrIh-2F1imsRXsdMwhLCm76OkRHlA1HPa2sf67xChCuBLHHLqdO2duqy7pfglXn4g3HCFsUX3DoaKuSPZkCU5z-2FP4CGM1qOALDiVZ4eHU-2BCgcD6EyFaOw7ermH6Gkpkr-2BeJuWgdR96mMQrL-2B02HbAJ7IB44uAYCMqvPdOd-2BSYzoL8qfhnjPKBusNyNhp9mFu3McvdtITR-2FBCxxPYaeWEHDBcAjBJjDBdJSYXxvktiKjvSuHBmftI62pEWS7tVo-2FB-2BTV0WkYnJw3ilVAmF7Vlk4inJ6J-2FFUFH5XxPzlAwdQu7Ie2ug8PvOaxPfPc8AEU-2FozAB4yingyQNW8Ve-2FG7q4lt1WSL8eSkkd8lt1UVdv5TKECYxjjDzjmpLaXbaRZ5GTw-3D-3D/x1JZ)) Unsurprisingly, both Roblan and McKeown support the Pacific Connector Pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG, ([2](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/UqdPhBkyQ3uU21aORGLDHA/h2/ttoZSWQLnwp-2F3mUr-2BX0afO56A2s1PFHuavbtuGizgABYEJk-2FJEie-2FmMfFstK326OWkrIHrGH9QU0edS8y3HZJanJxi-2Fg9CS7Z-2FR-2BrK8yZsCfLmX9iSQRzCp-2BCf-2FL32vjvkuMFuKaudBoZJVPDQ1IVztLWDmeANALobYxc6U4tXhQ7YoHs3iGqFP2Cw28Mt1-2FwbtS8O6fqDEr0vEBM5ofW6wOU16MHpBAntHU5YuEjruzIuzjELVY-2BjyUHgf6wIUp9TMN5WixdBemfF9uDTu2EteRdisQ2xkkn-2F-2FkQ9bqvP02lClLr58uGdzVJPZRdQ9q1h1o8G7fZFUz9rRcLufYQDnoUapDOk1agqAZXSEG8oY-3D/JtN9)) and have taken piles of dirty money from out of state corporate donors like Koch Industries, Chevron, BP, Comcast, PhARMA, Boeing, and corporate timber interests - as well as Jordan Cove, of course. ([3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/UqdPhBkyQ3uU21aORGLDHA/h3/QiJujz1OZ7IN5KAdas-2BNuToWxP6PR12HFo0Ld8Avm2-2FGEebKylDby4-2BqTY-2BflgFASIboCLtxNNZf7g0CnHi5wIBK-2Ft-2FtTjNvR0jvgqAzHbncEjrMbYc0q1ZMG0ZYYqlBxIns6A496p08vCTCJGjcn-2FJZVh2dhofYHDUIlTfGj6ikfCBs2omNTvqGsr5WqdRIwD-2B0C0tDiIZ9UmHx5b7QLD1CjCX8VkJ-2FIdmRr5swwfEgO2-2BDSrkPSVCX6Zl7JTdl4oK8dRw6rWkjZz8Ppo1X0pgA240eowsEaKXWOP0sa7TWbEx4scOBcB-2FIdqadzbk8B5ghtFcOpbhlrqiYFlZlHtMx9iCBv-2FPOfo3-2BZZOyD-2BT1LH1n-2BmG195UXkMQVpXCKKCEmaXf0W6fhWlIfpfqDV-2FWCzhRMJ48cpbK94BeRLrP8kKzjCgy-2BRdBm5eDnjdaXHJgLQ9KY1lZeCboBO8jvsA-3D-3D/_2y4), [4](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/UqdPhBkyQ3uU21aORGLDHA/h4/QiJujz1OZ7IN5KAdas-2BNuToWxP6PR12HFo0Ld8Avm2-2BoIVoK6Z7nSAo2w1CdCPmf8Zl2bVGsio3niBs1vIjQfJ4JuqoK5U6pQEjkGTqnPe5A2Ia4lhltUq6mJ3wt4rEa6krExzCaAI0XNGr9E2Qo36DFoBoXI6QKgsQnmER4-2FugfiUXajEKb20gPvSUHvIm6I30wWRoncaWi923rNMTK01rqZZRQZ5ELYbyitix8sPmn-2BI3mbBoisEJJiLgBpqIkDwC1-2FEnffqmhVX8Sn169c4YW1Md5Yb8U7jS-2BSl977WqypWLAaZNjQHkPe4H83Ri-2BNW9nmIhSWy5wjSZgkcvUTgJpM-2FtZn7mM0qnhZUF9VucrvTCaNkCk0mhhSY51VRXQ8ABQlwDlqdqvMz1IMeNkOuEkAjzwlrMZyGdI7qaIYt1wQnSb4mlR0E5YIiMqDqXgCyo0zlv6PNer7NSbkVTsUDUyksTz1f6jhkZjHOr5xXslO8vfJMqxEoKw42y612ZRnKXa8Ud57MaQ22Bg0sXYXB-2BbwIa70LR0NZyOvBdvOXI-3D/ko2g)) With more endorsements coming in each week, $100,000 raised, and a ground game about to kick off in January, establishment Democrats are feeling the heat -- and closing ranks. That's why we need you to chip in to help us fight back against attacks from DeFazio surrogates funded by Koch Industries, who are shameless boosters for Jordan Cove LNG.

clean_body: It is clear that these politicians are prioritizing corporate desires over the needs of the community. | | Hi Friend, When I decided to run, I knew that I would have to be prepared for attacks. I've been picking a fights with the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street banks, and powerful politicians all my life, and I'm proud to take a stand to defend our future. But the first shots fired in this campaign, are coming from Democrats...Democrats who take money from corporate PAC's and the fossil fuel industry, and are clearly feeling threatened by our surging campaign. Oregon Senator Arnie Roblan and House Rep. Caddy McKeown publicly punched down on me by name, asserting in The Coos Bay World that, "there is no one who can better represent the South Coast and deliver on our unique needs better than our dedicated Congressman." () Unsurprisingly, both Roblan and McKeown support the Pacific Connector Pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG, () and have taken piles of dirty money from out of state corporate donors like Koch Industries, Chevron, BP, Comcast, PhARMA, Boeing, and corporate timber interests - as well as Jordan Cove, of course. (, ) With more endorsements coming in each week, $100,000 raised, and a ground game about to kick off in January, establishment Democrats are feeling the heat -- and closing ranks. That's why we need you to chip in to help us fight back against attacks from DeFazio surrogates funded by Koch Industries, who are shameless boosters for Jordan Cove LNG. Here's the truth: our message has resonated with Oregonians across the district, and our movement is strong. That's why my opponent is paying to have this attack against me boosted on Facebook. Please chip in whatever you can, before the FEC filing deadline on 12/31. Your contribution sends a message that we are never backing down. Onward into 2020, Doyle | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . | | Hello Peter, Stephen Miller is a white supremacist policy advisor to Trump who is poisoning America with his hate. His leaked emails from 2015 and 2016 demonstrate the depths of just how twisted he is: In the wake of Dylann Roof murdering nine black churchgoers in Charleston, Miller emailed about how upset he was that Amazon and other retailers were reacting by ending the sale of Confederate flags from their sites. He pushed immigration policies based off of the race-based 1920s U.S. immigration laws that Hitler praised in _Mein Kampf_. He recommended Breitbart write a story relating current immigration issues to an obscure racist novel popular among neo-Nazis that pushes claims of "white genocide" and depicts Indian immigrants as violent rapists. It's been more than a month since his emails were leaked, and nothing's happened. name: Sara Gideon
subject: Let me explain
body:
At the end of this month, we have a very important FEC fundraising deadline.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c3/3904223469/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
At the end of this month, we have a very important FEC fundraising deadline. After it hits, my team will have to report not just how much money we raised, but how many individual contributions we've received so far.
I'll be honest, all eyes are on us right now. Susan Collins just officially launched her reelection campaign, so there is even more scrutiny now. Everyone -- from the Maine and national media to Mitch McConnell and Republican donors -- are looking to see whether our campaign has what it takes to finally beat her.
I know that the answer is _yes_ , we do. But in order to prove it to everyone else, we need to present a really good number when this FEC report goes public. That's why I have to ask:
**[Make a $3 contribution before our December 31st FEC deadline. I'm not taking any money from corporate PACs, so every individual donation makes a big difference.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c2/3904223469/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191223-1-full")**
I am so proud not just of all we've accomplished so far, but because of the way we've chosen to run our campaign. Our commitment to fund our work through grassroots donations instead of corporate PAC money might make our jobs a little harder, but it's more than worth it.
All my best,
_Sara_
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c2/3904223469/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191223-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c1/3904223469/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c0/3904223469/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fff/4bef7a87/6a24ab75/287f96c7/3904223469/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Dean Browning
subject: President Donald J. Trump is Winning Despite Phony Impeachment
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
This past week has been hectic in the political world, particularly with the House's decision to use the power of Impeachment for political gain.
While Rep. Susan Wild and Speaker Nancy Pelosi celebrate their "victory" with other liberal elites, Both President Trump and I are gearing up for battle in 2020.
Please consider making a small contribution to my campaign today so President Trump and I can fight back against Rep. Wild and Nancy Pelosi! Even just $20 will help us win in November!
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7zs2fpJRLHDppZZe0WfrSWGQi4pFh2S31hcv1ykPxGYh_DhY5u6ASOKKdmDNm6ai4Z3aqVeK1zWqs1Ta1r2qzPBiqhlALGn74yOSH0SoHkRoaArWPKoRclLhqbRQm0p0beAaachNpQDeQ0KrVYEW0niDtbZMkXUt5ptFPjgxAtbxfP5vv3i3w==&c=z2w27yTftR2dN9e-uwlS6LOiw72dFJS3AUylZLQ7JDdW1wmMfJr-Ww==&ch=HEL1MV05qOCLp7e2rIu9WrYvMGlwahYVfrXSVzumlVv2MDaAhp-XdA==)
---
| Rep. Susan Wild has spent the past few weeks supporting an unconstitutional impeachment while our President has been fighting for the American people. This past week alone President Trump signed the USMCA agreement, restored funding for historically black colleges, and ensured that the valiant men and women of our military are well-equipped.
Despite what the media says, President Donald J. Trump is WINNING. He is fighting for the average middle-class American, he is fighting for our minority communities that have been left behind by Democratic policies, and most importantly he is fighting for the United States of America.
The Lehigh Valley has greatly benefited from President Trump's agenda, but he needs more support to fight back against the Liberal Elite. Will you chip in a small donation so I can get Rep. Susan Wild out of office in November 2020 and support our President? A donation of $50, $25, or even just $10 will go a long in supporting President Donald J. Trump's agenda!
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7zs2fpJRLHDppZZe0WfrSWGQi4pFh2S31hcv1ykPxGYh_DhY5u6ASOKKdmDNm6ai4Z3aqVeK1zWqs1Ta1r2qzPBiqhlALGn74yOSH0SoHkRoaArWPKoRclLhqbRQm0p0beAaachNpQDeQ0KrVYEW0niDtbZMkXUt5ptFPjgxAtbxfP5vv3i3w==&c=z2w27yTftR2dN9e-uwlS6LOiw72dFJS3AUylZLQ7JDdW1wmMfJr-Ww==&ch=HEL1MV05qOCLp7e2rIu9WrYvMGlwahYVfrXSVzumlVv2MDaAhp-XdA==)
---
| , I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail as we work with President Trump to continue Making America Great Again. Together, we will get Rep. Susan Wild out of office in November 2020!
I hope you enjoy time with family and loved ones during this Christmas week.
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you seen what President Donald J. Trump has done this week? He is fighting for the American people! Will you chip in today so I can support our President and bring Conservative values back to Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District?

name: Team Stanton
subject: UPDATE: USMCA passes House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**_UPDATE_ : The bipartisan US-Mexico-Canada Trade Agreement officially passed the House of Representatives last week!**

Greg was a leader for this commonsense proposal from day one that will bring _thousands_ of new jobs to Arizona as well as _millions_ in investments in our communities.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OEc_sSBm1o1J8ntV0WyLLsWarSbrRYFtrrgiM8pCwBE=/UGhFF-n_tPBK638m3MJOn3orXsAd1R2M6SVV89d2phQ=?refcode=X_122119_USMCApasses_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

This is further proof that Greg is fulfilling every promise he made on the campaign trail - that he would get to Washington and go to work for Arizonans - growing our economy, creating new jobs, supporting workers, and protecting our environment.

[**Will you donate to now to help Greg keep up his work in Washington?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OEc_sSBm1o1J8ntV0WyLLsWarSbrRYFtrrgiM8pCwBE=/UGhFF-n_tPBK638m3MJOn3orXsAd1R2M6SVV89d2phQ=?refcode=X_122119_USMCApasses_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OEc_sSBm1o1J8ntV0WyLLsWarSbrRYFtrrgiM8pCwBE=/UGhFF-n_tPBK638m3MJOn3orXsAd1R2M6SVV89d2phQ=?refcode=X_122119_USMCApasses_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

We're proud to have Greg as our Congressman and with your help, we'll keep our momentum going.

\-- _Team Stanton_

name: Scout Walz
subject: Excited to meet you!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there! My name is Scout! I'm the newest member of the Walz family. I like to go on walks, eat food (especially people food), and chase my brother Afton, even though he doesn't seem to like it as much as me. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XWHU2wAALudKQqKxxG7klCWlSs0_6r9udlpgnlsEyyE=/CXCQtFqs9P2bKaHYxcC-Ap0cRq0nuTN2MmSBUjtQ9ow=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there!
My name is Scout! I'm the newest member of the Walz family. I like to go on walks, eat food (especially people food), and chase my brother Afton, even though he doesn't seem to like it as much as me.
There's been a lot of activity in our house lately. The people brought a big tree inside and have been putting boxes wrapped in paper under it. I'm not sure what's going on, but the ribbons taste good.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XWHU2wAALudKQqKxxG7klCWlSs0_6r9udlpgnlsEyyE=/CXCQtFqs9P2bKaHYxcC-Ap0cRq0nuTN2MmSBUjtQ9ow=?refcode=image&amount=25)
The people are talking a lot about a big event coming up next year and "keeping Minnesota blue." It sounds important.
[**I 've noticed they've been sending people to this website for support, so I thought I'd be a Good Boy and ask you myself. Will you help my people out?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XWHU2wAALudKQqKxxG7klCWlSs0_6r9udlpgnlsEyyE=/CXCQtFqs9P2bKaHYxcC-Ap0cRq0nuTN2MmSBUjtQ9ow=?refcode=body&amount=25)

name: Bernie Sanders for President
subject: Are you still there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT)
**Bad news first:** We haven’t heard from you in a while. So we wanted to check in, tell you a little about where we’re at, and see how you can help Bernie Sanders and our campaign.
**Now the good news:** Bernie is leading or in second place in poll after poll, and our campaign has more donors and more donations at this point in the race than any other campaign in the history of American politics. We have the largest volunteer base. And we have the best candidate with the longest track record of fighting for working people.
**Our ask:** We are aiming to send an unmistakable message about the strength of our movement. This is the time when it matters most. So I am asking you directly:
[**Can you add your name to say you endorse Bernie Sanders for president? It is important that our campaign knows who is supporting Bernie in this primary, and we're looking to collect a lot of signatures today.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie_endorse_re/?source=em191223-re&refcode2=5207.150750.5HMaVT&t=2&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT)
Every signature is important because this isn't just about Bernie. It's about all of us – together.
What we are doing is unprecedented. And as long as we keep it up, we are going to win. Thank you for adding your name today to show you stand with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie_endorse_re/?source=em191223-re&refcode2=5207.150750.5HMaVT&t=3&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=5207_150750_5HMaVT&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=7&akid=5207%2E150750%2E5HMaVT).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: What this campaign is about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, There are many other qualified candidates far better than the current occupant of the Oval Office. So, how is this campaign unique?

**We 've done things a bit different. We're standing up for the most vulnerable people, for immigrants, for the poor. We're telling hard truths others refuse to acknowledge.** The pundits and the consultant class say we should run a typical campaign--but we won't abandon our principles. [Donate >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc958/3eb3e2fc/69fe8537/744ec38f/1554205268/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191223_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191223_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191223_em_fr_b1_castro_all") **The consultants tell candidates we should tell voters in Iowa and New Hampshire what they want to hear: that they should continue to vote first. But we 're running an ad in Iowa that calls for change and a nominating process that reflects our diversity.**

We've also taken on issues others seem too afraid to address, like policing reform and immigration.

**We 're connecting with folks who are often left out of the process.** We've visited folks experiencing homelessness on Skid Row, the camps in Oakland, and in the tunnels under the Las Vegas strip.

We were the first to release plans on immigration, lead poisoning, respecting Indigenous communities, and eliminating hunger in our country.

**We will continue to speak to the important issues this country is facing and boldly telling the truth even when it 's hard to hear, because that's the only way we can fix anything.** [I understand this isn't the best way to court high-dollar donors, which is why we're building this campaign with grassroots donors with contributions averaging just $20. Chip in now to help keep us growing. >> ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc958/3eb3e2fc/69fe8537/744ec38e/1554205268/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc958/3eb3e2fc/69fe8537/744ec3f4/1554205268/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191223_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191223_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, There are many other qualified candidates far better than the current occupant of the Oval Office. So, how is this campaign unique? We 've done things a bit different. We're standing up for the most vulnerable people, for immigrants, for the poor. We're telling hard truths others refuse to acknowledge. The pundits and the consultant class say we should run a typical campaign--but we won't abandon our principles. "" The consultants tell candidates we should tell voters in Iowa and New Hampshire what they want to hear: that they should continue to vote first. But we 're running an ad in Iowa that calls for change and a nominating process that reflects our diversity. We've also taken on issues others seem too afraid to address, like policing reform and immigration. We 're connecting with folks who are often left out of the process. We've visited folks experiencing homelessness on Skid Row, the camps in Oakland, and in the tunnels under the Las Vegas strip. We were the first to release plans on immigration, lead poisoning, respecting Indigenous communities, and eliminating hunger in our country. We will continue to speak to the important issues this country is facing and boldly telling the truth even when it 's hard to hear, because that's the only way we can fix anything. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" This campaign isn 't about tactics, it's about people. name: Team Warren
subject: Can Elizabeth count on you to use Reach over the holidays?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Over the next few days, as you catch up with friends and family from near and far, we need your help to share Elizabeth's plans and keep track of the people in your life who are in this fight with us. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b2/1961164883/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://events.elizabethwarren.com/?utm_source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&first_name=&last_name=&zip=18326")
---
Happy Holidays!

We hope that wherever you are and however you're celebrating the holiday season, you're spending quality time with friends, family, and the people you hold most dear.

And when you're catching up with people you haven't seen in a while, it's the perfect time to talk with them about why you're on Team Warren, too. Because as the New Year quickly approaches, so do primaries across the country -- and we need you with us now more than ever.

**That's why we want to let you know about _Reach_ -- a grassroots canvassing app to help you keep track of who in your life is in this fight with us -- so you can use every conversation about why you're on Team Warren to grow our grassroots movement.**

**[Click here to create a _Reach_ account now -- and kick off the holidays with a plan that will help Elizabeth win in 2020!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b5/1961164883/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://reach.elizabethwarren.com/#/j/33FFP2/")**

Over the next few days, as you catch up with friends and family from near and far, we need your help to share Elizabeth's plans and keep track of the people in your life who are in this fight with us. That's where _Reach_ comes in.

With _Reach_ , we can grow our grassroots movement by meeting people right where they are -- over a festive meal, around the fireplace, and even while picking something up at the grocery store.

**Create a _Reach_ account now to turn those conversations into an opportunity to grow our grassroots movement:** | **[**I'M IN**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b5/1961164883/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://reach.elizabethwarren.com/#/j/33FFP2/")**
---

Thanks again for everything you do, and we're wishing you and yours a warm and happy holiday season!

Team Warren

_P.S._ Want to learn more about how and when to use _Reach_? Check out this **[step-by-step guide to get started](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b4/1961164883/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMTkxMjIzLXJlYWNoZm9ydGhlaG9saWRheXMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/toolkit/how-to-use-reach/?source=email-20191223-reachfortheholidays-full")** , and we'll keep growing our grassroots movement -- one conversation at a time!

| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b7/1961164883/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b6/1961164883/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b9/1961164883/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23b8/1961164883/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23bb/1961164883/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bde0/45c30650/117ecefc7/66fa23ba/1961164883/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/69606/images/lofgrenlogo2%20%281%29.png]
Hi there,

I know this is busy time, but I want to take just a moment to wish you a very happy and healthy holiday season. Whatever your reason for celebrating, I hope you have the chance to enjoy some quality time with those nearest and dearest to you and to recharge for the coming new year.

I also want to take this opportunity to personally thank you for the support and encouragement you have given me over this past year. It keeps me going, even on the most trying of days in Washington.

In 2020, let’s keep working together to defend our shared values and promote the bold ideas that our country deserves. Next year’s elections are shaping up to be the most consequential of our lifetime — and I am incredibly grateful to have you by my side in this fight.

Happy Holidays and a Very Hopeful New Year to you and your family, friends, and loved ones.

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
Click here to unsubscribe. body:
Will you take my final Democratic Survey of the year before midnight? I need input from 10,000 Democrats to ensure 2020 is Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. >>
---
| | **This is your final chance to share your feedback with our Democratic leaders before the year ends --_but we 're still missing your response!_** [_**Ben Ray needs 10,000 responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size and ensure Democrats have an UNBEATABLE plan to defeat McConnell in 2020. Will you take 30 seconds to complete this critical Democratic Survey? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all") -Team Ben Ray **\----------- Forwarded Message -----------** From: Ben Ray Lujan Date: Sunday, December 22, 2019 [Will you take my final Democratic Survey of the year before midnight tomorrow? I need input from 10,000 Democrats to ensure 2020 is Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all") | I just launched my final Democratic Survey of the entire year.

We're days from the most consequential election year in our country's history -- **I 'm going to make sure it's Mitch McConnell's final year in power.**

_[**10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: It would mean so much if you 'd take 30 seconds to share your feedback with me. I'm relying on your input more than you know to WIN this critical Senate race and FLIP McConnell's Senate >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all")_
** ** ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all")**
---

I don't say this lightly:

We're days from the biggest election year in our country's history.

**And I 'm going to make sure it's Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. **

[_**I just launched my final and most important Democratic Survey of the year. I need 10,000 responses to start the year off with an unbeatable strategy to WIN my Senate race and DEFEAT McConnell 's Senate. Can I count on your input? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all")

I watched in disgust as McConnell covered up President Trump's ties to Russia...

As he threatened our Medicare and Social Security...

As he sabotaged Democrats' critical legislation to prevent gun violence...

**I will NOT watch him win another term in power. **

[_**You helped me make history and take back the House for Democrats last year. Now, I 'm asking you to help me take back the Senate. It's going to take every single Democrat coming to the table to shape our winning strategy. Can I count on your critical input? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b778/18e32a7f/5086ed41/7b228df0/2372421665/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191223_em_pet_b1_22dsv_all")

I'm so grateful to have you on this team,

Ben Ray Lujan

name: Taylor, MJ for Texas
subject: URGENT: 8 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The final FEC deadline before the primary is just 8 days away and early voting begins on February 18!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c92c/3712261004/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c923/3712261004/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[Pitch in to help MJ close 2019 strong and WIN in 2020>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c923/3712261004/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**URGENT, Peter: The final FEC end-of-quarter deadline before the primary is just 8 days away and early voting begins on February 18!** We need your help to finish 2019 _strong_ and give MJ the resources to win in 2020.
[**Donate now!**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c923/3712261004/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=10&recurring=true")
This month is our _last chance_ before the primary to show everyone that MJ can compete with Sen. Cornyn's war chest. We don't have the big money backing of the special interests -- but we just need enough resources to spread MJ's message to Texas voters, especially since there are still a number of undecided primary voters.

Here's the bad news, though: With the holidays in full swing, our fundraising will slow down -- and we can't afford to fall behind. **That makes YOUR SUPPORT even more crucial! Will you pitch in $5 or more to help MJ win the primary and defeat Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c921/3712261004/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c920/3712261004/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c927/3712261004/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890666/7f51f7bc/4a16dbe9/4ef0c926/3712261004/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finishstrong?refcode=email_20191223.2nd__679__")**
Thanks,
Taylor

name: Candidate Alert via info@michaelbennet.com
subject: Carter, Kerry, Obama, Bennet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| The pundits are trying to count Michael out.

Here's the truth: [History has shown us that early frontrunners aren't the ultimate winners in presidential races.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

In 1976, the Democratic field was very similar to that of the 2020 field - crowded and with very little consolidated support.

While there were four top contenders, in the end, it was the least-known candidate, Jimmy Carter, that claimed the nomination after winning in Iowa and New Hampshire.

In 2003, Joe Lieberman was leading the pack. In a matter of months, John Kerry went from a low-polling long shot to the de facto Democratic nominee.

Barack Obama was trailing by double digits until he won the Iowa Caucus.

These early polls weren't predictive of how things would develop and change on the campaign trail over the course of weeks and months.

With your support, we're proving that Michael is just getting started.

[Now we're facing a huge fundraising deadline as we close the book on 2019.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Today, we're counting on your support to get Michael's message in front of the 76% of undecided voters. Will you rush a donation right now to help us raise $700,000 to invest in New Hampshire? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Some pundits have called Michael's campaign a long shot. [But thanks to your support, we continue to prove them wrong.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign is powered by people like you.

Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, and he's not a billionaire who can write himself a $100 MILLION check.

Every step we've taken in this journey has been because you're there with us, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Your support is crucial ahead of the year's final fundraising deadline. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters again? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
