Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made incredible progress and we continue to build support across the country.

_Now we 're planning for what comes next._

[We've planted our flag in New Hampshire and we're planning to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program, but we can't do it if we fall short of our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As a senator from a purple swing state, Michael has never known an easy election, and he's ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

[We need you to stand with us.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ef/134673f2/96fae03/69979d50/4253989418/VEsHDQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friend - I will make this quick...

I need you to help both Senator David Perdue and I with one click by splitting a campaign contribution evenly right here:

🔒 **[http://stevedaines.com/5050](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=9d077c9e67d6431b8dc3de08c670948e&_e=DvUlsERIYwog5kwrYHOIemWoRPn0XV59Cqvg7ACnKQM3TG-c4FdlnyaNmStpLfMic-sw2IWpQ_NVwx338VwfXyxuDyglbza82voj_YrBMe8DgdjJ33quacyu9IxifsGWkk4Lghk1qXlzJWMGskYE6nymsxalTAdQiqjBbnhH5NrFPbQCGgzUb8JbK9O4marZWwx6QSz2HMuy0t8IMvAnh48e8oQY8fVWQJi2KY2YMU_byCl2qq33h37LL3pMseuy3i0a1Y-tmiyv4Zpvur9U755quNKX3G68bOO9XkhL3VxhObvQWiI_LLot97wxOOMXejJSFm2jXiTHEwS-Bb1JSGTLcAeh_Z3w5VknfuNXbJRkuOAQB5n88XhuRa4zSbPS)**

Let me explain why your support for us is so important.

Next year, Republicans have a large map of conservative Senators to defend. We have nearly twice the amount of races up compared to Democrats, and we have to defend our majority.

**All Democrats have to do is gain 4 seats and they return to power in the U.S. Senate.** With tough races from Georgia to Montana and from Maine to Arizona, we're going to need every single conservative grassroots supporter like you to step up and help us win our races.

%%FIRST%%, we know there are so many important races to help over the next 11 months, so that's why we've created a special way for you to help both me and Senator Perdue with one donation if you click right now.

**[Please follow this secure link to instantly split a gift 50/50 and help two conservative GOP Senators at once!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=9d077c9e67d6431b8dc3de08c670948e&_e=DvUlsERIYwog5kwrYHOIemWoRPn0XV59Cqvg7ACnKQM3TG-c4FdlnyaNmStpLfMic-sw2IWpQ_NVwx338VwfXyxuDyglbza82voj_YrBMe8DgdjJ33quacyu9IxifsGWkk4Lghk1qXlzJWMGskYE6nymsxalTAdQiqjBbnhH5NoWtJsz9A2WVo1npAvNdOxUebtQHhCgfYPhZt34Z5ouM-3ROxjwhSAUW-_goDut0FSI_hDBmVz2dORociBS9Vu7C4TwCPJM8Ai8YBraLo0_buRPZ4JgkjF4WfHH3FUv5B2TEK6T3RugbuTufC4xPo8CiDrnI8emMh78H_zW_pp59fyKYn-9_uEsyL5fqTdBt2WBzOOgWalMqHsimueV_TKt)**

**[Every dollar you give- whether it's $10 or $100 - will help Republicans save the Senate majority next year!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=9d077c9e67d6431b8dc3de08c670948e&_e=DvUlsERIYwog5kwrYHOIemWoRPn0XV59Cqvg7ACnKQM3TG-c4FdlnyaNmStpLfMic-sw2IWpQ_NVwx338VwfXyxuDyglbza82voj_YrBMe8DgdjJ33quacyu9IxifsGWkk4Lghk1qXlzJWMGskYE6nymsxalTAdQiqjBbnhH5NrpmIXECjbgK5vPNGfHHnkZgg9mYs9U98cFGBZ2LTNw0eu4EdP6OSwiB_nftvEUTWryhXCHSxB3D07sY_IsDbO4d-CWcZ6fXSHbImm3rTabl5QoCpCqDgtkzoycc-cdF9k8bbZ4A8SF9_gZQS5cSMSuASBbiADSgqT7A9uWc6VLOSvPoYYFSwGNZMGedxwaqevD1_0c6ZnFuA0Mpcz5QDYN)**

Please help however you can.

Thank you,

Senator Steve Daines

| [**Support Senator Daines and Senator Perdue ➜**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=9d077c9e67d6431b8dc3de08c670948e&_e=DvUlsERIYwog5kwrYHOIemWoRPn0XV59Cqvg7ACnKQM3TG-c4FdlnyaNmStpLfMic-sw2IWpQ_NVwx338VwfXyxuDyglbza82voj_YrBMe8DgdjJ33quacyu9IxifsGWkk4Lghk1qXlzJWMGskYE6nymsxalTAdQiqjBbnhH5NqEIIV7h2kXn9hCSTJQnPUmn4asC1UJzX-yFrUIRTMTPzvEoUJeHY8v0wtHaaMUh0JI1W3W5T2ygiBEYoGYJpMxSEWd8qj3CBM5IjGM84oephcU9cPb2pWnLLIVBt0Nm8HAbugZ3HobWD7bXnq5qjUPEKrj9A63GIJafWaeqI2oEF-7HBVd16DbNmI_uvfRY23bfKQLoUJrzoqfYbAeTmm4)

subject: Carter, Kerry, Obama, Bennet

body:
| |

| The pundits are trying to count Michael out.

Here's the truth: [History has shown us that early frontrunners aren't the ultimate winners in presidential races.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

In 1976, the Democratic field was very similar to that of the 2020 field - crowded and with very little consolidated support.

While there were four top contenders, in the end, it was the least-known candidate, Jimmy Carter, that claimed the nomination after winning in Iowa and New Hampshire.

In 2003, Joe Lieberman was leading the pack. In a matter of months, John Kerry went from a low-polling long shot to the de facto Democratic nominee.

Barack Obama was trailing by double digits until he won the Iowa Caucus.

These early polls weren't predictive of how things would develop and change on the campaign trail over the course of weeks and months.

With your support, we're proving that Michael is just getting started.

[Now we're facing a huge fundraising deadline as we close the book on 2019.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Today, we're counting on your support to get Michael's message in front of the 76% of undecided voters. Will you rush a donation right now to help us raise $700,000 to invest in New Hampshire? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Some pundits have called Michael's campaign a long shot. [But thanks to your support, we continue to prove them wrong.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign is powered by people like you.

Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, and he's not a billionaire who can write himself a $100 MILLION check.

Every step we've taken in this journey has been because you're there with us, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made incredible progress and we continue to build support across the country.

_Now we 're planning for what comes next._

[We've planted our flag in New Hampshire and we're planning to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program, but we can't do it if we fall short of our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As a senator from a purple swing state, Michael has never known an easy election, and he's ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

[We need you to stand with us.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ec/134673f2/9620309/69979d6e/1405898649/VEsHDQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Yes / No
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "Nearly 120 million eligible Americans did not participate in the November elections." \-- Center for American Progress on the 2018 election. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Jane Fonda reached out to ask you to make a donation to Ed Markey. Can you chip in today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Jane Fonda's note. | |
---
| **We wanted to make sure you saw Jane Fonda 's note below. She's asking you to make a donation to our campaign to re-elect Ed. Our ability to win this fight depends on what we do collectively in this moment. If you're with us, please make a donation today.**
**[DONATE NOW](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717f/3451992459/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191223-c")**
Friends -

I'm reaching out today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend and co-author of the Green New Deal, Senator Ed Markey.

As you may have heard, I've gotten into the habit of getting arrested in our nation's capital -- putting my body on the line with young people, making an intergenerational compact to demand a Green New Deal.

Earlier this year, Senator Ed Markey told me he needed us to help build an army of activists.

We need people in the streets demanding action on the climate crisis. The Green New Deal won't happen without it, but it also won't happen without powerful leaders like Senator Markey inside fighting with us.

That's why we need to make sure our army is behind him every step of the way as well.

Right now, that means he needs our support in his re-election campaign to the U.S Senate. He's facing the toughest race of his career in 2020.

**[Can you make a donation to Senator Ed Markey's campaign today ahead of the official FEC deadline? The future of our planet depends in many ways on having his powerful leadership in the Senate fighting for the Green New Deal.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717f/3451992459/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191223-c")**

Through our protests (and arrests) in Washington, I've gotten to know Ed quite well. He's led on this issue for decades.

He understands that urgent action is needed but it will be hard to accomplish. Because we need systemic change across every sector of our society and it must happen very quickly.

And the truth is that we cannot make the change we need at the scale we need as lone individuals. It will only be possible by combining our powers and lifting our voices together. There's strength in numbers. This is a collective, existential crisis that requires us to come together to fight.

The same is true for campaigns like Senator Markey's.

It is only with a movement of people behind him that he can win and continue to lead on this issue.

People in this country are really scared about the climate crisis and its threat to our planet and its people. They want to do something, but nobody has asked them.

So today, I'm asking you to do something:

**[Please make a donation to Senator Ed Markey today. There's an important FEC deadline coming up in a few days, and I want to make sure everyone knows that our army is behind him -- not just in the fight for the Green New Deal but also to support his re-election campaign.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717f/3451992459/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191223-c")**

These fights will not be easy, but Senator Markey and I are up for them. I hope you are too. Please join with us.

Thank you,

Jane Fonda **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717f/3451992459/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjMtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191223-c")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717e/3451992459/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfdd/693b8b0a/439404e1/72de717d/3451992459/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")

| | **Introducing the Juli an Castro Youth Coalition!** Young minds have driven the conversation on our country's most pressing issues. Now, they're coming together to use their voices to share Julian's vision for the future of our country! The **Juli an Castro Youth Coalition** consists of youth leaders across the country fighting for issues like **gun violence prevention** , **immigrant rights** , **environmental justice** , and **educational equity**. The group will host frequent coalition calls, brainstorm campaign travel, highlight issues and injustices, hold grassroots meetings, AND they want you to join them! If you consider yourself a Youth for Julian**,** [sign up here.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecda7/2668277775/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://organizing.juliancastro.com/youth-coalition/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+sign+up+here&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc") If you know a Youth for Julian, [share this link with them.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecda6/2668277775/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://organizing.juliancastro.com/youth-coalition/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+share+this+link+with+them&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc") Listen to why the founding members joined the Youth Coalition: | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecda5/2668277775/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://organizing.juliancastro.com/youth-coalition/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc")

#TeamJulian

[**JOIN US**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecda4/2668277775/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://organizing.juliancastro.com/youth-coalition/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+JOIN+US&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecdaf/2668277775/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecdae/2668277775/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc959/3eb3e2fc/6985c5e0/744ecdad/2668277775/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191223_em_pol_yc&source=20191223_em_pol_yc"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Light a candle tonight
body:
In wishing you a Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah, I want to share this story with you.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357906-835736-4780440-cd85fca622-829f3e6c6f)
Patriot,

In wishing you a Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah, I want to share this story with you.

It’s not an easy story to take in, but it serves as a reminder of unbreakable faith and is a reminder why we should never allow our faith to be denigrated.

This story is about Rabbi Israel Shapiro and his small congregation.

The Rabbi and his people didn’t have much to celebrate, but they were determined to carry out the traditions of Hanukkah.

Women pulled threads from their tattered clothes and twisted them with scraps of fat to make candles.

Raw potatoes were used as candle holders to form a menorah.

It was 1943 and Rabbi Shapiro and his people were confined in Bergen-Belsen.

50,000 Jews were killed in Bergen-Belsen including 15 year-old Anne Frank.

Despite the setting, the Jewish inmates of the concentration camp quietly made their way into one of the barracks and began the Hanukkah ceremony which starts with the Three Blessings.

If you’re not familiar with Jewish traditions, the first two blessings we say every night.

They are:

Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who has sanctified us with His Commandments, and commanded us to kindle the Chanukah light.

Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who performed miracles for our forefathers in those days, at this time.
Rabbi Shapiro paused and his voice began to break before he said the third blessing which is for the first night of Hanukkah:

Blessed are You, Lord our God, King of the universe, who granted us life, sustained us, and **enabled us to reach this occasion**.
As the Rabbi finished the third blessing, he began to cry. Israel Shapiro stood alone in front of the congregation, thanking God for enabling them to reach that night.

He stood alone because his beloved wife, his only daughter, his only grandchild and his son-in-law were dead. They didn’t survive to celebrate the first night of Hanukkah.

Despite his unimaginable sorrow, Rabbi Shapiro thanked God.

And as he lit a makeshift candle, the Rabbi composed himself and told the weeping survivors in the freezing barracks, “By kindling this Chanukah candle, we are symbolically identifying ourselves with the Jewish people everywhere. Our long history records many bloody horrors our people have endured and survived. We may be certain that no matter what may befall us as individuals, the Jews as a people – with the help of God – outlive their cruel foes and emerge triumphant in the end.”

Rabbi Shapiro’s story is fitting as Hanukkah is about re-dedication to faith and overcoming our most trying times.

Jesus celebrated Hanukkah.

If you feel it’s appropriate in your household, light a candle in the remaining days of Hanukkah as a reminder that there is **nothing evil people can do that will ever succeed in separating families from faith and God from His people**.

In the coming year, our political adversaries will attempt to divide us.

We experienced a glimpse of that last week when liberal Christians attempted to create a rift among Evangelicals.

We also saw it on Saturday when 25 Jewish House Democrats called for the firing of Jewish senior White House staffer Stephen Miller.

They are creating a façade that pits Jews against Jews and Christians against Christians. We can expect them to take it further by trying to turn Christians against Jews and vice versa.

You and I know that our faith and our values are stronger than that.

The Nazis, despite their horrendous efforts, couldn’t get Rabbi Shapiro to turn against God.

Using his strength as our guide, the Left stands NO CHANCE of getting us to turn against each other.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and thank you so much for your continued support.

To you and your family, I wish you a very Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-357906-835736-84585d41bbe610b-829f3e6c6f)

---

name: MondaireForCongress.com
subject: Biggest and most important deadline we’ve had
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress Mondaire Jones for Congress
body:
There’s a lot going on this week. Lots of people are preparing to celebrate the holidays. And as of tomorrow, we only have 1 week left until our biggest, most important fundraising deadline. | | | Happy Monday Friend, There’s **_a lot_** going on this week.
* As of tomorrow, we only have**1 week left** until our biggest, most important fundraising deadline.
* Lots of people are preparing to celebrate the holidays. We know that a lot of you plan on spending time with loved ones on Tuesday & Wednesday, not reading our emails.
* **So we need to raise 102 grassroots contributions today if we want to make up for the slowdown in donations later this week.**

**[We can’t emphasize enough how important it is we hit our fundraising goal next week: raising 3,000 donations is critical if we want to go into 2020 prepared to go up against our corporate-backed competition.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/vn5Np5flS-6_OS88lJbj9Q/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqweVXLq6oNHrG3Yc4arzhr2OHmMh-2FBrRiJ2tXuT-2FkKe9SaAR0wXu6DY8DqMCf0JN5xa1tuEA73WLu4QBZ7pEx4PTjqPG6kfDt5un4uup4YyMN09pmb3CLZnyNQ7vaPvHPhgTUhDQYiS96GwXwthBbwflV0FAUp85RxQusJbN4vAimAd6NqpNgMipJju7ZMIGBGylcV3x4hRLctALP25l3J07-2Bv86axWIQ1O-2FpO9Uqa54tabEOaBcoMy-2FXRb86hcwj3JKlxGQbN2LZShhaiidxfmtm4Zp9al8KCIXubMrILLFY-3D/q3Ni)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4AA/ni0YAA/t.2xs/vn5Np5flS-6_OS88lJbj9Q/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqweVXLq6oNHrG3Yc4arzhr2OHmMh-2FBrRiJ2tXuT-2FkKe9TkrnJbfGJbhhl5T07avO-2F-2BMKdArvQ4QpE3HWnSPSBkRwKEMrTT0lwubqJ2kUCWSzNl5fNiUC8NUCZFBQ5EQrePV9Ug8qGO4aeBtjfNmI4W0EqfkGF55OApTcatAjE89I5HFDg80HO7-2Bb9rZ4SsUdUeeR3L0dFzbeQSDUEAtqmZbl-2BMVoZO-2FhVd5OvWDp2qo-2BrvT9MjINU-2FB7TGlMzUP2ed1xBUBGAmE49iK-2F9PbwS6jjUVZlnB8nLztFMDN-2FlJc3s-3D/qqpH) **** __ There’s so much at stake in this election. clean_body: There’s a lot going on this week. Lots of people are preparing to celebrate the holidays. And as of tomorrow, we only have 1 week left until our biggest, most important fundraising deadline. | | | Happy Monday Friend, There’s a lot going on this week. As of tomorrow, we only have1 week left until our biggest, most important fundraising deadline. Lots of people are preparing to celebrate the holidays. We know that a lot of you plan on spending time with loved ones on Tuesday & Wednesday, not reading our emails. So we need to raise 102 grassroots contributions today if we want to make up for the slowdown in donations later this week. There’s so much at stake in this election. We’ve seen the important differences between Mondaire and his competitors enough times this year to know he’s the only candidate fighting for real change — he isn’t afraid to be bold and unrelenting in his progressive values. The harsh reality is that every Democrat says we need to support working families, but none of our opponents have joined Mondaire in supporting universal childcare**. Every Democrat running in this race says climate change is a problem, but not a single one agreed with Mondaire at a town hall the other week that it’s time to pass a Green New Deal. A majority of Democrats agree we need campaign finance reform, but in this race there are still candidates accepting money from corporate PACs, the fossil fuel industry, and Big Pharma. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Chris Christie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- This is the last time I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign before we take a few days off for the holidays. Can you spare a moment to let me explain? The truth is, these emails are a very important part of how we're funding our campaign for Senate. I'm refusing to take any money from corporate PACs, and that means we need a lot of grassroots Democrats from across the country to support our campaign to stay competitive with our opponent's backing from McConnell's right-wing donor network. Thankfully, we've been able to do that so far. It's a big part of the reason the political forecasters believe we're now in a toss-up race and why the most recent public poll of this election has us defeating Cory Gardner. Now, here's the problem: starting very early in January, we anticipate Republicans will spend outrageous sums of money attacking me and our campaign. They hope to knock us out before the race even begins. We're even hearing that Trump ally, Chris Christie is launching a seven-figure TV and digital advertising buy in Colorado and other Senate races as soon as today. That and more is why we have set an ambitious goal to raise more than $500,000 online by the FEC fundraising deadline next week. Since you're such an important part of our team, I have to ask: [**Can you make a contribution of any amount today to help us fight back against Republican attacks and hit our fundraising goals before we file our FEC report at the end of the month?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191223-eoy?refcode=em-191223-lastchance1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191223-eoy?refcode=em-191223-lastchance1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Thank you very much for stepping up and being a part of this campaign. Your support is the reason we're in a position to win this election. Happy holidays, -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191223-eoy?refcode=em-191223-lastchance1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

**As the year comes to a close, we want to say thank you for being with us.** Don’t tell Tom, but we’re all signing a secret holiday card for him and his family here at Tom 2020. We know he’s been working really hard holding town halls, meeting voters, and preparing for debates, so it will be a nice surprise for him as he takes a (very quick) break from the campaign trail. Since you’re part of this team, Friend, [_**we’re sharing the card with you so that you can wish Tom some holiday cheer.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWBqae3eqdLg2YoJqw9Njgp9N3HpQiN-2F93437yVBgXCcaRaIzJNsTiTdeJCq0rkOw-2F5qiZQ6HK2GIx-2BZ9zpmxcKTaoWkMB7rGpzw-2F9ZSL7QtOqq1apQSDFToSodxP789E8F9ecUWvG8-2B7VVo7GBGZ2q-2FpvA7opnhzAWMDYLnARfcXkHKHNnAF5xDUkwVK5zAKw-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdocfizqV30lotopmQEZSOJyfMT9ZkQJ7ECudNewfs5lwx36xNbi7NvoK5zTJd2xGsidzL4ZYKv-2BrvLZCckRRX1owJtiuzUWN21J3AUZ-2FozplSApDy3wPmhswSoOzqBEbFwYcIRHhIXGMpxQ55XFX8H0-2FxEPDVldVPmwgk0nLKkQdXm5-2F9BnZSdsIDyjFoVx1MRFz3pYA0cmMSofA1X4zO9y6EUkKptqEvmuWkSIpbAHMPZtPLuFvDXpPnhqu8P0PNCorRUAFv1x4p4USBBx6-2Fkd57PLlIvWL6EpHsiHUgWYHym48dGbLXXwLRlVWsdelmxRleBwPJIZrOp1vO2-2Fs6XFHQeMNGKJZquc2EsTnszIQ-3D-3D) Thank you for everything you do,

**Here's the bad news:** We need 7,756 contributions before midnight to reach our three-day Big, Structural Change Fund goal -- and if we don't pick up the pace, it looks like we're going to fall short.

**But here's the good news:** If every single person reading this makes a contribution right now, we can still turn it around and reach our goal before midnight. But we know not everyone will. That's why we really need you.

**[We're thanking all first-time donors with a free "Warren" sticker! Right now, we're in the most critical period we'll ever have in this election, and we need to kick things into high gear to run the strongest campaign possible in the last weeks before voting begins.

So we launched a three-day Big, Structural Change Fund to raise the resources we need to make critical investments in ads, outreach, and organizing ahead of the first primaries.

**But we're pacing behind where we need to be, and your first contribution would go a long way toward hitting our goal of 30,000 grassroots donations before midnight.**

**[Chip in for the first time to help hit our Big Structural Change Fund goal and help power our movement forward. If you contribute before midnight, we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bdf8/45c30650/117cec237/66fa2b36/334037513/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1NOThGX0ZORF9TSE9fUV8yMDE5MTIyM19WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM98F_FND_SHO_Q_20191223_V1S1_P")**

name: Nikki Foster
subject: I have something to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ced4/30a4f917/50985899/28ce8193/3411007444/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1")

| | It's a sad day for southwest Ohioans. Our representative not only took a cowardly stance on holding Donald Trump accountable for corruption -- he's also under investigation for corruption himself. His campaign stands accused of paying his campaign manager $57,000 for "unknown purposes," and misplacing over $100,000 in campaign funds. This is exactly the type of "leadership" that everyday Americans are sick of -- behavior like this has sown near-universal mistrust of our government in every corner of the country. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - It's a sad day for southwest Ohioans. Our representative not only took a cowardly stance on holding Donald Trump accountable for corruption -- he's also under investigation for corruption himself. **His campaign stands accused of paying his campaign manager $57,000 for "unknown purposes," and misplacing over $100,000 in campaign funds.** This is exactly the type of "leadership" that everyday Americans are sick of -- **behavior like this has sown near-universal mistrust of our government in every corner of the country.** We have to restore honor to federal office in order to repair our government's relationship with our citizens. [**That 's why I'm asking you to chip into our Democratic campaign to oust Steve Chabot.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+to+chi&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1") | | | [Donate](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Donate&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1")
---
Working families need to know our government has their best interests at heart -- they need to know their representatives are working to protect and expand their health care access, their earned benefits, a living wage, to name a few.
Our government has grinded to a halt in the face of partisan bickering, corruption, and gridlock. **We need to kick people out who have proven they won 't prioritize results for the American people.**
Chabot has spent two and a half decades in Congress, and what do we have to show for it? Votes to cut Medicare and Medicaid, to gut protections for those with pre-existing conditions, a refusal to address the climate crisis, and cowardly inaction in the face of horrific gun violence.
He's had more than enough chances to prove himself. [**It 's time to have someone new take over, and I'm ready to take that baton and fight for you in Washington -- but I need your help to get there ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Itrsquos+time+to+have+someone+new+take+o&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191223_EOQ3_U3_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | It's a sad day for southwest Ohioans. Our representative not only took a cowardly stance on holding Donald Trump accountable for corruption -- he's also under investigation for corruption himself. His campaign stands accused of paying his campaign manager $57,000 for "unknown purposes," and misplacing over $100,000 in campaign funds. This is exactly the type of "leadership" that everyday Americans are sick of -- behavior like this has sown near-universal mistrust of our government in every corner of the country. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - It's a sad day for southwest Ohioans. Our representative not only took a cowardly stance on holding Donald Trump accountable for corruption -- he's also under investigation for corruption himself. His campaign stands accused of paying his campaign manager $57,000 for "unknown purposes," and misplacing over $100,000 in campaign funds. This is exactly the type of "leadership" that everyday Americans are sick of -- behavior like this has sown near-universal mistrust of our government in every corner of the country. We have to restore honor to federal office in order to repair our government's relationship with our citizens. "" | | | "" Working families need to know our government has their best interests at heart -- they need to know their representatives are working to protect and expand their health care access, their earned benefits, a living wage, to name a few. Our government has grinded to a halt in the face of partisan bickering, corruption, and gridlock. We need to kick people out who have proven they won 't prioritize results for the American people. Chabot has spent two and a half decades in Congress, and what do we have to show for it? Votes to cut Medicare and Medicaid, to gut protections for those with pre-existing conditions, a refusal to address the climate crisis, and cowardly inaction in the face of horrific gun violence. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: We need your help to wish President Trump and the First Lady Merry Christmas.
body:
Let's show him support while the fake news attacks him! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df6b9045870f/calling-all-patriots-12102145?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ec916e1a4d&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [SIGN THE CARD](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1cefec5fbd&e=795c6d9796 "SIGN THE CARD")
---
| Peter,

I know you're probably preparing for Christmas Eve with your family [**but I wanted to ask you a quick favor.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6dba1d3eb5&e=795c6d9796)

We wanted to deliver a Christmas Card to President Trump and the First Lady to show them support during this difficult time for them.

The impeachment-first Democrats and the fake news have been attacking the First Family non-stop and we think hearing from their supporters would show them that there are still patriots out there who want to Make America Great Again.
---
| [SIGN THE CARD](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5e2f5004a2&e=795c6d9796 "SIGN THE CARD")
---
| [**Please click on the link and sign the card before midnight tonight**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ab1108ecbb&e=795c6d9796) and share the card on social media or forward it to your friends so we can get as many signatures as possible.

Thank you for taking the time and have a very Merry Christmas.
For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=99a59bb439&e=795c6d9796) Janet Barresi
---
| | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f407740e8d&e=795c6d9796) | [Share](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=722f54acf5&e=795c6d9796)

body:

I was reading through the results of my recent priorities survey and didn’t see your answers! If I am going to truly represent Pennsylvania, I need EVERYONE to take my short survey.
I want to know your thoughts on impeachment, border security and abortion, so will you take my priorities survey now? Thank you,
Lisa Scheller Peter, I’m gearing up to run one of the highest-stakes races in the entire country, right here in Pennsylvania. It’s still early, but the national Democrats have already painted a target on my back – the spotlight will shine brightly in our state.
**That’s why I’m turning to you – I need your help to shape my strategy. Looking ahead to 2020, I need to know where you stand on the issues:**
Abortion. Medicare-for-All. Open borders. Taxes.
I have developed a priorities survey to find out what the people of Pennsylvania believe, so I can best represent them. I need you, Peter, to let me know your thoughts on these very important issues facing our nation.
**[Will you take my priorities survey now?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=24cc022870214f938832d1f50b55afcc&_e=Xt_rUbM_smvMJSJtYAVlnx3RiIjfipe8bvIInC9nF98AkKaD5qRCRUZrK1IxbFq98-NeykVzSKwxFTEzP86N9pU_c5CU7xMp2ZuMqOFJKHiZB_aDbiLya0JitU3MAgWgvxIw2r0vNikKuGDUOHMd3sofYJPU35PIQhbz7r2m-SXNzLZl0DD4XsalrHEZbvrGpkCNlTB2-J8cE0D1rpwIO21RRSyfUzcDE4Sm_L2T62OC9sOHpdYHL9I519BAEzR36ISzdzYyyZO-sp9qFuZ5e4jN0Rykvy2z6iM7q43scVrDL1Y6hdY8CncDQG4El-ZvMjIaJGeOFA_vIHBg9XNj0iWwys0MXnB24eIU0XSLkflTRHw2jPhCUamUgpTo3KlDel_nGNWwWj2se6pnzbgxfQI_rJbu3ISo-7GEhvq8Jtrt_az3qghJoCPd-p2yHuK5)** [ **PRIORITIES SURVEY: TAKE THE SURVEY NOW** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=24cc022870214f938832d1f50b55afcc&_e=Xt_rUbM_smvMJSJtYAVlnx3RiIjfipe8bvIInC9nF98AkKaD5qRCRUZrK1IxbFq98-NeykVzSKwxFTEzP86N9pU_c5CU7xMp2ZuMqOFJKHiZB_aDbiLya0JitU3MAgWgvxIw2r0vNikKuGDUOHMd3sofYJPU35PIQhbz7r2m-SXNzLZl0DD4XsalrHEZbvrGpkCNlTB2-J8cE0D1rpwIO-rsyZ06BJ9LRJo_5DcN7xhKD3bpaKo1fIlp0EocWpZaceYnZ6xpW2l4_kZok4CKyp9TOxV6OOC7qDFPWJAa-ya1Hoip2_TYeaQhhXeZsXSdgUeGsmttY1QZZn3v2Wi4foLGwMWmilHi3-hW7vVoBrR6P_48Bbgn2xvtF_VxMTEmXMoFLIDvreW7QDqFB4qx8xUBxLJhMndP4BWT6TAkhtiW19Dz-Rjwm4AE2r9DQsOi) In Congress, I will make Congress work for the good people of Pennsylvania – I won’t be focused on political games like Pelosi.

clean_body: I was reading through the results of my recent priorities survey and didn’t see your answers! If I am going to truly represent Pennsylvania, I need EV Peter, I was reading through the results of my recent priorities survey and didn’t see your answers! If I am going to truly represent Pennsylvania, I need EVERYONE to take my short survey. I want to know your thoughts on impeachment, border security and abortion, so will you take my priorities survey now? The survey is only 8 short questions and will take you less than 2 minutes. Thank you, Lisa Scheller Peter, I’m gearing up to run one of the highest-stakes races in the entire country, right here in Pennsylvania. It’s still early, but the national Democrats have already painted a target on my back – the spotlight will shine brightly in our state. That’s why I’m turning to you – I need your help to shape my strategy. Looking ahead to 2020, I need to know where you stand on the issues: Abortion. Medicare-for-All. Open borders. Taxes. I have developed a priorities survey to find out what the people of Pennsylvania believe, so I can best represent them. I need you, Peter, to let me know your thoughts on these very important issues facing our nation. In Congress, I will make Congress work for the good people of Pennsylvania – I won’t be focused on political games like Pelosi. I will need you to take my priorities survey, so I know what are YOUR legislative priorities. Peter, will you take my survey right now? Thank you, Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress (PA-07) PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

name: Yang2020
subject: We don’t have wine caves. But we do have one of the strongest grassroots teams ever built.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Here’s the evidence of how strong this team is:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5114%2E377263%2Er_QxVL) Yang Gang --

When Andrew decided to run for president, he knew how difficult it would be. He knew he didn’t have extensive donor networks or bundlers -- and he knew that every inch of progress we made toward the White House would have to be hard-fought and hard-won by this grassroots team.

**We don’t have wine caves. But we do have one of the strongest grassroots teams ever built -- we have the Yang Gang.**

Here’s the evidence of how strong this team is:
* Andrew was one of seven candidates remaining on the most recent debate stage.
* Hundreds of thousands of Americans have made a contribution to this campaign.
* We started from scratch and now have millions of people around the country supporting Andrew and our Humanity First message.

What we’re doing is working. So we need to keep doing what we’ve been doing -- including asking for your support to build on this momentum.

**[With just six weeks until the all-important Iowa Caucuses, rush a contribution of $10 or more and keep our movement growing. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

subject: who's your favorite?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| | The latest presidential primary debate was last week **and now we need to know how you feel.**

[Who is your current 2020 Presidential favorite?](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-primary-straw-poll?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Who+is+your+current+2020+Presidential+fa&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")
| | [TAKE THE POLL »](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-primary-straw-poll?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+THE+POLL+raquo&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")
---
10,000 Responses Needed
* * *
This is one of the most consequential elections of our lifetimes. We're running out of time to act on climate change, and we don't have another four years to waste.

Last debate, we were listening closely to each candidate lay out their climate action plan.

But we still haven't endorsed any presidential candidate yet. That's why before we head into the holidays, we're eager to hear your thoughts.

[Will you tell us who your top presidential candidate is (for now)? ](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-primary-straw-poll?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+tell+us+who+your+top+presidenti&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")
| [TAKE OUR POLL](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-primary-straw-poll?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+OUR+POLL&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")
---
10,000 Responses Needed
Thank you for your feedback,

314 Action Team

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb435d/4bd7760e/45b6df81/77ad29f1/127956592/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NWI2ZGY4MSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MzVkIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/45b6df81/29bb435d?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb435d/4bd7760e/45b6df81/77ad29f0/127956592/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_191223_1_1")** to make a donation.

name: Kim Mangone
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Mangone For Congress
body:
But first, I need to thank a few people.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13178810/136500392/-818771882?refcode=header-img&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=43db95c4-fa25-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiOTVjNC1mYTI1LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjbZmdx24dFrNSwFw5BhFIZ334L_ZBViDy4uODgrP8U=)
---
Peter — I hope that you are having a nice holiday week with friends and family. I don’t like having to do this, but in a moment, I have to ask you for a small contribution to my Democratic campaign.

[**But before I do, I want to make sure that I thank a few people who have recently stepped up and made a donation to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13178811/136500393/10128690?refcode=20191223-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC-RS&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=43db95c4-fa25-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiOTVjNC1mYTI1LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjbZmdx24dFrNSwFw5BhFIZ334L_ZBViDy4uODgrP8U=)
* * *
_Donna J. from Kernville chipped in $5. I appreciate it, Donna._

_Christopher L. from Tehachapi contributed $25. Thank you, Christopher._

_Linda A. from Ridgecrest donated $25. It means a lot, Linda._
* * *
[I mean it when I say this, Peter: Our campaign would collapse without grassroots donations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13178812/136500394/10128690?refcode=20191223-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC-RS&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=43db95c4-fa25-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiOTVjNC1mYTI1LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjbZmdx24dFrNSwFw5BhFIZ334L_ZBViDy4uODgrP8U=)

Listen, I don’t come from a rich, well-connected family. I don’t have any special interest mega-donors on speed-dial. _And that’s fine by me!_

I count on REAL people like you, and Donna and Christopher and Linda, to step up when you can to help me defeat Trump’s biggest enabler in the House, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. And I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running together, Peter.

We've had so many requests for our brand new Team MJ bumper stickers, we're offering them one last time this year as a special thank you for your donation of $5 or more!*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489067e/7f51f7bc/4a2b5393/4ef0ce42/2362280277/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191223.3nd__681__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489067e/7f51f7bc/4a2b5393/4ef0ce42/2362280277/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191223.3nd__681__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Once MJ wins the primary, we'll need the resources to stand up to an endless wave of attack ads from Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies. **Right now, Sen. Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest.** Our team doesn't need to match him dollar for dollar, but we _do_ need enough to run a winning grassroots campaign!

And that's where you come in, Peter. Unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs. She's relying on your support to power this movement! But this is the last full fundraising quarter before the primary election, and we're running out of time.

Please make your first donation now to join Team MJ and help us build a winning grassroots campaign. If you donate $5 or more we'll send you a special 2020 sticker as a thank you for your support!*
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
